description: Port human-readable output of register, prune, and reset commands to match the Go CLI exactly, including emoji-staged headers, indented details, section listings, and aligned count lines.

userStories.title: Port register Command Human Output to Go Indented Format
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the register command human output to use green bold checkmark header with indented per-deployment details so that it matches the Go CLI format exactly.
acceptanceCriteria: Register human output prints green bold '✓ Successfully registered N deployment(s)' header
Each deployment shows indented details: Deployment N, Deployment ID, Address, Contract, and optional Label
Label line is omitted when empty
Multiple deployments separated by blank lines, no trailing blank line after last
comfy_table and truncate_address summary line removed
JSON output (--json) is completely unchanged
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes with no new warnings

userStories.title: Port prune Command Human Output to Go Section/Emoji Format
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the prune command human output to use emoji-staged section listings with per-type grouping so that it matches the Go CLI format exactly.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty result prints '✅ All registry entries are valid. Nothing to prune.'
Dry-run prints '🔍 Checking registry entries...' header and '🗑️  Found N items to prune:' with per-section listings
Deployment candidates rendered as '  - {id} at {address} (reason: {reason})'
Transaction candidates rendered as '  - {id} [{status}] (reason: {reason})'
Destructive mode shows '⚠️' confirmation, '🔧 Pruning registry entries...', and '✅ Successfully pruned N items'
Cancellation shows '❌ Prune cancelled.'
Backup still created internally before destructive removal
JSON output (--json) completely unchanged
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes

userStories.title: Port reset Command Human Output to Go Aligned-Count Format
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the reset command human output to use 'Found N items to reset' header with aligned per-type count lines and plain success message so that it matches the Go CLI format exactly.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty result prints 'Nothing to reset. No registry entries found for the current namespace and network.' in plain text
Items found prints 'Found N items to reset for namespace ... on network ... (chain ...):' with aligned per-type counts
Per-type count lines use fixed-width label alignment matching Go spacing
Confirmation prompt matches Go wording exactly
Success message is plain text 'Successfully reset N items from the registry.' with no color or emoji
Backup still created internally before removal but path not displayed
JSON output (--json) completely unchanged
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes

userStories.title: Update Unit Tests for register, prune, and reset Output Changes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests and CLI assertion-based integration tests updated to match the new Go-matching output format so that all tests pass.
acceptanceCriteria: cargo test -p treb-cli --lib -- prune passes
cargo test -p treb-cli --lib -- reset passes
cargo test -p treb-cli --test cli_prune_reset_migrate passes
All output string assertions updated to new Go-matching format
Assertions referencing removed elements (comfy_table headers, stage markers, backup path lines) removed
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes

userStories.title: Update E2E Workflow Test Assertions for register, prune, and reset
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E workflow tests updated to assert on the new Go-matching output format so that all E2E tests pass.
acceptanceCriteria: cargo test -p treb-cli --test e2e_register_workflow passes
cargo test -p treb-cli --test e2e_prune_reset_workflow passes
Register assertions check for '✓ Successfully registered' and 'Deployment ID:'
Prune assertions check for section listings and emoji-staged messages
Reset assertions check for 'Successfully reset N items from the registry.'
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets passes

userStories.title: Update All Golden Test Expected Files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all golden test expected files for register, prune, and reset regenerated so that golden tests pass and no cross-command drift occurs.
acceptanceCriteria: UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 cargo test -p treb-cli --test integration_register --test integration_prune --test integration_reset passes
Golden file diffs match expected output format changes with no unexpected regressions
cargo test -p treb-cli passes (full CLI test suite, no cross-command failures)
cargo test --workspace --all-targets passes (full workspace validation)
Error golden files (uninitialized, bad prefix, tx not found) remain unchanged
